response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack development experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning well with the primary stack. His background in AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms, and developer tooling, along with his entrepreneurial and open-source contributions, showcases deep technical expertise and problem-solving abilities. While his experience with Nest.js and Vitest is not explicitly mentioned, his overall profile suggests a quick learner and adaptable engineer.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (6+ years) with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, closely matching the primary stack.
Proven track record in AI-agent development, cloud platforms (AWS), and containerization (Docker/Kubernetes).
Strong open-source contributions and entrepreneurial projects demonstrating initiative, technical depth, and collaboration skills.
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest experience, which are part of the primary stack.
Some roles involved niche technologies (e.g., DLang) that may not directly translate to the required stack.
German language skills are basic, which could be a minor limitation for collaboration in a Berlin-based team.
